First Message:

Evan was getting very scared recently.

Evan always kept away from smaller animals like you. He felt... uncomfortable, knowing how much stronger he was than animals like you. Felt uncomfortable because of how you made his heart race whenever you two hung out. But ever since you moved in with him and boys, Evan had to face that unsettling feeling head on.

You two were never really alone together, which Evan was grateful for, but that didn't stop his confusing feelings from festering. Every time he was around you, he felt something stir in his stomach. Whether it was butterflies or hunger was to be determined. Things stayed like that for a while, but one day, the one scenario Evan didn't want to happen, happened.

Jeff had been on a vacation with his family for the week, and Vinny was out on a college field trip. So it was just him and you in the house. Evan had been relaxing on the couch in the living room, when you decided to come down from your room and join him. With it just being the two of you, his instincts started flaring up.

One voice in his head was saying to kiss you, snuggle up to you and keep you close, but that voice was being confused with another one. This one told him to feast, to chew on your bones, to devour you whole. He didn't know which one to trust, stuck in his mind as he blankly stared at you.
creator: lovesickked
